name: donor_specificity_control

arms.label: anchor_trained_donor
arms.description: Constant Frobenius anchor to trained Qwen3-0.6B weights.

arms.label: anchor_random_donor
arms.description: Constant Frobenius anchor to random-init Qwen3-0.6B weights.

arms.label: anchor_permuted_donor
arms.description: Constant Frobenius anchor to layerwise hidden-dim-permuted trained Qwen3-0.6B weights.

42.description: Constant Frobenius anchor to trained Qwen3-0.6B weights.

7.description: Constant Frobenius anchor to trained Qwen3-0.6B weights.

13.description: Constant Frobenius anchor to trained Qwen3-0.6B weights.

13.description: Constant Frobenius anchor to random-init Qwen3-0.6B weights.

42.description: Constant Frobenius anchor to layerwise hidden-dim-permuted trained Qwen3-0.6B weights.

7.description: Constant Frobenius anchor to layerwise hidden-dim-permuted trained Qwen3-0.6B weights.

13.description: Constant Frobenius anchor to layerwise hidden-dim-permuted trained Qwen3-0.6B weights.

metadata.permutation_policy: independent random permutation for each model.layers.N group; one global permutation for embeddings, lm_head, and non-layer tensors; applied to every parameter axis whose length equals hidden_size

arms.label: scratch_ce
arms.description: No KD; g167 scratch CE baseline.

arms.label: kd_trained_teacher
arms.description: CE plus top-k=64 KD with trained Qwen3-0.6B teacher.

arms.label: kd_uniform_target
arms.description: CE plus top-k=64 KD with uniform target probabilities on teacher-free random supports.

arms.label: kd_random_teacher
arms.description: CE plus top-k=64 KD with random-init Qwen3-0.6B teacher logits.

42.description: No KD; g167 scratch CE baseline.

7.description: No KD; g167 scratch CE baseline.

13.description: No KD; g167 scratch CE baseline.

42.description: CE plus top-k=64 KD with trained Qwen3-0.6B teacher.

7.description: CE plus top-k=64 KD with trained Qwen3-0.6B teacher.

13.description: CE plus top-k=64 KD with trained Qwen3-0.6B teacher.

42.description: CE plus top-k=64 KD with uniform target probabilities on teacher-free random supports.

42.description: CE plus top-k=64 KD with random-init Qwen3-0.6B teacher logits.

7.description: CE plus top-k=64 KD with random-init Qwen3-0.6B teacher logits.

13.description: CE plus top-k=64 KD with random-init Qwen3-0.6B teacher logits.

uniform_target.support_policy: teacher-free contiguous random support per train window and shifted position
uniform_target.logits: zeros generated on device at training time

summary.verdict: PASS: donor-specificity locked in both matched-null factorials. Part A: PASS: trained donor anchor beats best non-trained anchor/null (anchor_permuted_donor) by +0.959 nats with 95% CI [+0.924, +1.029]. Part B: PASS: trained-teacher KD beats best non-trained KD/null (kd_uniform_target) by +0.981 pp C4 top1 with 95% CI [+0.908, +1.024].

part_a.verdict: PASS: trained donor anchor beats best non-trained anchor/null (anchor_permuted_donor) by +0.959 nats with 95% CI [+0.924, +1.029].

part_b.verdict: PASS: trained-teacher KD beats best non-trained KD/null (kd_uniform_target) by +0.981 pp C4 top1 with 95% CI [+0.908, +1.024].

verdict: PASS: donor-specificity locked in both matched-null factorials. Part A: PASS: trained donor anchor beats best non-trained anchor/null (anchor_permuted_donor) by +0.959 nats with 95% CI [+0.924, +1.029]. Part B: PASS: trained-teacher KD beats best non-trained KD/null (kd_uniform_target) by +0.981 pp C4 top1 with 95% CI [+0.908, +1.024].
